title: Additional fields in SCIM provisioning
excerpt: It’s great that Monday.com supports basic SCIM provisioning, but we’d like to see it possible to use SCIM provisioning to manage custom fields on the user profile (e.g., we have two organization levels that everyone is f…

posts.author: LizMasoudi-GG (Liz Masoudi)
posts.cookedHtml: It’s great that Monday.com supports basic SCIM provisioning, but we’d like to see it possible to use SCIM provisioning to manage custom fields on the user profile (e.g., we have two organization levels that everyone is familiar with called Function and Business and we want to automatically keep those up to date on user profiles) AND have the ability to provision Department for each user so that we can easily see the allocation of Monday.com licenses among departments in our organization.

posts.author: vmccausland (Valery McCausland)
posts.cookedHtml: We are also interested in updating user departments via SCIM user provisioning for license tracking purposes.
